response.justification: Candidate brings ~13 years of broad full-stack and systems experience across TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, and Java, with exposure to high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry foundations, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal/IC6 growth-systems role. Title history tops out at Staff/Senior rather than Principal, and there is no evidence of leading multi-team platform initiatives at enterprise scale.
strengths: Polyglot engineering depth across TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java spanning web, backend, and embedded
High-throughput distributed systems exposure (millions of HTTP req/s at Sociomantic)
Demonstrated platform/tooling mindset: CI/CD setup, test frameworks, MCP code generators, open-source platform ownership
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-automation experience listed
No evidence of telemetry/metrics platform work or applied statistical analysis
Career level and scope (Staff/Senior IC, smaller orgs) below Principal/IC6 cross-team platform leadership bar

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot systems and platform-tooling background
Seniority and cross-team influence scope below IC6
